title: Contact (prospect or customer)
description: A natural-person contact record for CRM-like use cases. The first standard schema published under the aithos.data v0.1 sub-protocol.

name.description: Full name of the contact, as the subject wishes to refer to them. Required.

email.description: Primary email address. Indexable for exact-match lookup. Optional.

phone_hash.description: BLAKE3 hash of the normalized phone number. Indexable for exact-match lookup without leaking the number itself. The clear phone lives in the encrypted payload.

status.description: CRM pipeline status. Drives filtering and pagination in list_records queries.

tags.description: Free-form labels (e.g. 'priority', 'fr', 'web-source'). Indexable for tag-based filtering.

source.description: How the contact entered the pipeline (e.g. 'linkedin', 'referral', 'web-form').

created_at.description: When the contact record was first created. Server-set; clients MUST NOT supply.

modified_at.description: When the contact record was last modified. Server-set.

last_contacted_at.description: When the subject last reached out. Client-set.

phone.description: Phone number in E.164 or any locale format the subject prefers. Stored encrypted; the platform sees only phone_hash.

notes.description: Free-form text notes. The subject's working journal on this contact.

conversation_log.description: Append-only log of interactions. Each entry is a structured turn (user / agent / contact).

form_responses.description: Free-form structured data from qualification forms or onboarding questionnaires.

custom_fields.description: Subject-defined custom fields. Encrypted because their meaning is private to the subject's workflow.

from.description: Who produced the turn. 'user' = the subject themselves; 'agent' = an authorized app speaking on their behalf; 'contact' = the contact.
